activities_projects.title: Scientific Reasoning Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Analyze the relationship between scientific observation and survival in space
steps: Read the part of the story where Claribel collapses
Discuss how the crew realised something was wrong with the air
Explain the scientific principle behind using canaries to detect dangerous gases
Write a short explanation connecting the story with real-life mining practices
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how animals can act as early warning systems in scientific contexts
activities_projects.evaluation: Logical explanation and connection with real-life examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Critical Character Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the character traits and motivations of Sven
steps: Identify actions taken by Sven in the story
Analyze whether Sven’s decision to bring Claribel was responsible or risky
Provide textual evidence to support your opinion
Write a short paragraph evaluating Sven’s character
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical thinking and character analysis skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of arguments and textual references (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Cause and Effect Mapping
activities_projects.objective: Understand the chain of events leading to the discovery of the air problem
steps: Identify the key events in the story
Create a cause-and-effect diagram showing how each event leads to the next
Highlight how Claribel’s behavior helped the crew
Present the diagram to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to analyse narrative structure and logical sequences
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of cause–effect relationships (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Science Fiction Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Examine how science fiction combines imagination with scientific ideas
steps: Identify elements of science fiction in the story
Explain how the writer uses realistic scientific ideas in the narrative
Compare the story with real-life space missions
Write a short analysis on how science fiction helps people imagine future technologies
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of imagination in scientific storytelling
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Problem-Solving Simulation
steps: Imagine you are a member of the space station crew
Identify possible actions after noticing Claribel’s unusual behavior
Discuss different solutions with your group
Present the best solution and justify your decision
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn collaborative problem-solving and logical reasoning
activities_projects.evaluation: Effectiveness of solution and reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Inference-Based Question Activity
steps: Read the extract about the alarm failure carefully
Identify clues that explain why the air purifier malfunctioned
Infer the consequences if Claribel had not been present
Write your conclusions with supporting evidence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve inference and evidence-based reasoning
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of interpretation and use of evidence (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Study – Animals as Safety Indicators
activities_projects.objective: Explore real-world applications of animal behavior in safety systems
steps: Research examples of animals used to detect environmental dangers
Compare them with the canary in the story
Prepare a short report explaining similarities and differences
Present your findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand interdisciplinary links between literature and science
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Advanced Vocabulary Application
activities_projects.objective: Understand and apply advanced vocabulary from the story
steps: Identify difficult words from the story
Write their meanings using a dictionary
Create sentences that demonstrate their usage
Share your sentences with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance vocabulary and contextual understanding
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and creativity in sentence construction (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Future Technology Debate
activities_projects.objective: Encourage critical thinking about technological safety systems
steps: Divide the class into two groups
Debate whether animals should be used in scientific experiments
Use examples from the story and real-life situations
Summarize the main arguments presented
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop argumentation and ethical reasoning skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Strength of arguments and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Science Fiction Writing
activities_projects.objective: Encourage imaginative thinking and creative writing
steps: Imagine a future space mission with an unusual companion animal
Describe how the animal helps astronauts solve a problem
Write a short science fiction story
Share your story with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop creativity and narrative writing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, structure, and clarity of the story (10 marks)
